title: Lesson 26
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for daily life.

words.meaning: a small case for money and cards
words.example: I keep my bus card in my wallet.

words.meaning: a small paper or card that lets you enter or ride
words.example: Please show your ticket at the gate.

words.meaning: a small metal thing used to open a lock
words.example: I cannot find my house key.

words.meaning: a container for drinks or liquid
words.example: She carries a water bottle to school.

words.meaning: a cloth used to dry your body or hands
words.example: Use this towel after you wash your hands.

words.meaning: something used with water to clean your hands or body
something you take when you are sick
a picture that shows places and roads
words.example: We use a map to find the hotel.

words.meaning: a chart that shows days, weeks, and months
words.example: Mark the test day on your calendar.

words.meaning: something you hold over your head when it rains
words.example: Bring an umbrella because it may rain.
